positive: Minimalist illustration of a celestial forest scene at dawn. Focus on stylized silhouettes of various exotic trees and fauna (deer, cranes, luminous moths) against a gradient background of deep indigo, soft lavender, and glowing pale gold. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, suitable for repeating textile prints. Utilize clean, graphic lines and solid blocks of color for maximum print contrast. Soft rim lighting emanating from the horizon line, creating a heavenly, dreamy atmosphere. Vector art style, high contrast, clean silhouettes, perfect for apparel graphic design.
